name: cloud-sql-postgresql
description: Inspect Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL schema objects and run SQL with the data skills.

interface.shortDescription: Explore PostgreSQL schemas, views, and stored procedures on Cloud SQL.
interface.longDescription: Bundle the Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL data skills so Codex can inspect schema objects and execute SQL queries against the connected Cloud SQL instance.
defaultPrompt: Use the Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL data skills to explore schema objects, views, and stored procedures.
Run SQL queries against my Cloud SQL instance and summarize the results for me.
